responseMessageContents.text: Live is healthy at commit f1eb2fb7, booted ~15 min ago. GitHub token isn't set as env var visible. Let me check the creds file and continue the QA end-to-end.

input.command: cat _test_creds.py 2>/dev/null | head -80; echo "=== ENV FULL ==="; env | grep -iE "GITHUB_TOKEN|GH_TOKEN|RENDER|OPENAI|SUPABASE_URL|SUPABASE_KEY|SUPABASE_ANON|IVX_OWNER" | sed 's/=.*/=<SET>/'

output.stdout:
import json, urllib.request, ssl

ctx = ssl.create_default_context()

with open('expo/.env') as f:
    env = {}
    for line in f:
        line = line.strip()
        if line and not line.startswith('#') and '=' in line:
            k,v = line.split('=',1)
            env[k] = v.strip('"').strip("'")

# Test GitHub
token = env.get('GITHUB_TOKEN','')
print(f"GITHUB_TOKEN length: {len(token)}")
if token:
    req = urllib.request.Request('https://api.github.com/user', 
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github+json', 'User-Agent': 'IVX-Audit'})
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=ctx)
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        print(f"GITHUB_USER: {resp.status} — {data.get('login','?')}")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode()[:200]
        print(f"GITHUB_USER: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"GITHUB_USER: ERROR — {e}")

# Test repo access
if token:
    req = urllib.request.Request('https://api.github.com/repos/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest',
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github+json', 'User-Agent': 'IVX-Audit'})
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=ctx)
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        print(f"GITHUB_REPO: {resp.status} — {data.get('full_name','?')} (private={data.get('private')})")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode()[:200]
        print(f"GITHUB_REPO: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"GITHUB_REPO: ERROR — {e}")

# Test Render
rk = env.get('RENDER_API_KEY','')
sid = env.get('RENDER_SERVICE_ID','')
print(f"\nRENDER_API_KEY length: {len(rk)}, SERVICE_ID length: {len(sid)}")
if rk and sid:
    req = urllib.request.Request(f'https://api.render.com/v1/services/{sid}',
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {rk}', 'Accept': 'application/json'})
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=ctx)
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        print(f"RENDER: {resp.status} — {data.get('name','?')}")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode()[:200]
        print(f"RENDER: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"RENDER: ERROR — {e}")

# Test Supabase
su = env.get('SUPABASE_URL','')
sk = env.get('SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY','')
print(f"\nSUPABASE_URL length: {len(su)}, KEY length: {len(sk)}")
if su and sk:
    req = urllib.request.Request(f'https://{su}.supabase.co/rest/v1/',
        headers={'apikey': sk, 'Authorization': f'Bearer {sk}'})
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15, context=ctx)
        print(f"SUPABASE: {resp.status}")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        body = e.read().decode()[:200]
        print(f"SUPABASE: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"SUPABASE: ERROR — {e}")
=== ENV FULL ===

responseMessageContents.text:
The user said "Environment variables are set up. Please continue." but I cannot find any of the requested credentials in my environment. The requestEnvs widget from the previous turn apparently didn't successfully save the values into my sandbox shell environment.

Let me re-request the envs properly.

The credentials didn't reach my sandbox shell — `env` shows none of `GITHUB_TOKEN`, `RENDER_API_KEY`, `RENDER_SERVICE_ID`, `SUPABASE_URL`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, or the OPENAI key. Only the public EXPO vars and `SUPABASE_CLI_VERSION` are present. Without these I cannot push the new commit to GitHub, trigger/verify the Render deploy, or exercise owner-login routes against Supabase — so the final QA would be blocked at items 1, 2, 6, and 19.

Let me re-request them so they actually land in my environment this time.

envs.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
envs.description: GitHub PAT with push access to ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest. Used to push the autonomous-mode + browser-automation commit so Render auto-deploys.

envs.name: RENDER_API_KEY
envs.description: Render API key for service srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0. Used to read deploys and confirm the new commit is live.

envs.name: RENDER_SERVICE_ID
envs.description: Render service ID for the IVX backend (srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0).

envs.name: SUPABASE_URL
envs.description: Supabase project URL (project ref). Used to verify owner login + Members module data via REST.

envs.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
envs.description: Supabase service-role key. Used to read members/waitlist rows for the Members module verification.

envs.name: IVX_OWNER_EMAIL
envs.description: Owner account email used to log in and exercise owner-only routes end-to-end.

envs.name: IVX_OWNER_PASSWORD
envs.description: Owner account password used to log in and exercise owner-only routes end-to-end.
